================================================================================
  WORKFLOW TRIGGER MATRIX
================================================================================

Workflow                 │ Push main/dev │ Push feature │ PR to main/dev │ Schedule
─────────────────────────┼───────────────┼──────────────┼────────────────┼──────────
Build & Test             │ ✅ Yes        │ ✅ Yes (001-*)│ ✅ Yes        │ No
Code Coverage            │ ✅ Yes        │ No           │ ✅ Yes        │ No
Multi-Java Test          │ ✅ Yes        │ ✅ Yes (001-*)│ ✅ Yes        │ ✅ Daily (2 AM UTC)
Integration Tests        │ ✅ Yes        │ ✅ Yes (001-*)│ ✅ Yes        │ No (load tests daily)
Security Scan            │ ✅ Yes        │ No           │ ✅ Yes        │ ✅ Weekly (Sun midnight)
Release                  │ On git tag v* │ N/A          │ N/A           │ N/A

================================================================================
  WORKFLOW DETAILS
================================================================================

1. BUILD & TEST (build-and-test.yml)
   Purpose: Compile code and run unit tests
   Duration: ~20 seconds
   Steps:
   - Checkout code (full history)
   - Setup JDK 21
   - mvn clean install -B --no-transfer-progress
   - Validate Nginx configuration
   - Upload test reports
   - Upload coverage to Codecov
   
2. CODE COVERAGE (code-coverage.yml)
   Purpose: Generate JaCoCo coverage reports and validate thresholds
   Duration: ~3 minutes
   Steps:
   - Checkout code
   - Setup JDK 21
   - mvn clean verify -DskipITs (with JaCoCo)
   - Generate reports: mvn jacoco:report
   - Upload to Codecov
   - Create PR comment with reports
   - Check 60% minimum threshold
   
3. MULTI-JAVA TEST (multi-java-test.yml)
   Purpose: Test on Java 21 and Java 25
   Duration: ~2 minutes per version (4 minutes total)
   Matrix: Java 21, Java 25
   Steps per version:
   - Setup JDK (matrix version)
   - mvn clean test -Djacoco.skip=false
   - Archive test results
   - Comment on PR with status
   Verify job:
   - Validate Byte Buddy 1.18.8
   - Validate JaCoCo 0.8.14
   
4. INTEGRATION TESTS (integration-tests.yml)
   Purpose: Run integration tests and load tests
   Duration: ~5 minutes (45 minutes for load tests)
   Jobs:
   4a. Payment Bridge Integration
       - mvn clean verify -pl payment-bridge
       - Upload results (7-day retention)
   
   4b. Mock Payment API Integration
       - mvn clean verify -pl mock-payment-api
       - Upload results (7-day retention)
   
   4c. Load & Performance Tests (main/develop only)
       - Matrix: 1, 3, 5 instances
       - Timeout: 45 minutes
       - Run: mvn clean test -pl mock-payment-api -Dtest=*LoadTest,*FailureDistributionStatTest
       - Captures throughput, latency, error rates
   
   4d. Load Balancer Docker Build (main/develop only)
       - Build ./load-balancer/Dockerfile
       - Validate components (scripts, config files)
   
5. SECURITY SCAN (security-scan.yml)
   Purpose: Scan dependencies for vulnerabilities
   Duration: ~5 minutes
   Jobs:
   - Dependency Vulnerability Check (JSON report)
   - Maven Security Audit (HTML report, OWASP)
   - Software Composition Analysis (SBOM XML)
   
6. RELEASE (release.yml)
   Purpose: Build and publish release artifacts
   Duration: ~2 minutes
   Trigger: Git tag matching v*
   Steps:
   - Extract version from tag
   - mvn clean package -DskipTests
   - Create GitHub release
   - Attach payment-bridge-*.jar
   - Attach mock-payment-api-*.jar
   - Archive artifacts (90-day retention)

================================================================================

✅ T080 - Code coverage (JaCoCo)
✅ T082 - E2E test suite
✅ T096 - CI/CD pipeline (ALL WORKFLOWS)
✅ T097 - Release procedures

Additional Coverage:
✅ Multi-version testing (Java 21 & 25)
✅ Security scanning (OWASP)
✅ Load testing (1, 3, 5 instances)
✅ Performance validation
✅ Artifact management (7-90 day retention)

================================================================================
  HOW TO USE
================================================================================

1. Run tests locally before push:
   mvn clean test -DskipITs
   mvn clean verify  # Full integration tests

2. Create a release:
   git tag -a v1.0.0 -m "Release 1.0.0"
   git push origin v1.0.0
   # Release workflow starts automatically

3. View results:
   - GitHub Actions tab → Click workflow
   - PR status checks → Click Details
   - Artifacts section for reports

4. Skip workflow:
   git commit -m "Update docs [skip ci]"

  NEXT STEPS (Future Enhancements)
================================================================================

- [ ] Docker Image Build & Push (Kubernetes prep)
- [ ] Performance Trend Reports (weekly tracking)
- [ ] Deployment Workflow (staging/prod automation)

The 6 current workflows fully satisfy Speckit Phase 8 requirements.
